stem: Complete the description of the fetch-execute cycle by typing the missing word into each gap.
review_notes: Free-typed cloze. Accept lists are case-insensitive lowercase canonical forms; PC and MAR / MDR allowed in caps too.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Type the missing word or abbreviation into each gap.

part_config.text: At the start of each cycle the {{g1}} holds the {{g2}} of the next instruction. That value is copied into the {{g3}} so memory can be read. The instruction itself comes back into the {{g4}}. Once in the CPU the instruction is {{g5}} by the control unit and then {{g6}} by the appropriate part of the processor.

mark_points.text: executed by appropriate part of CPU
